node.statement: FIB-NOMIX-001: For any finite complex vector β with nonzero `sum_ν |β_ν|^2`, the no-mixing amplitudes `A_ν = conjugate(β_ν) / sqrt(sum_ν |β_ν|^2)` satisfy `sum_ν conjugate(A_ν) A_ν = 1`. This proves the scalar normalisation used by the `summary.tex` §11.1 vacuum and tau RG formulas ([[def:RG-amp]]).
